description:
Data Preset reference is a component that takes any value type for PresetValue. When this is triggered by a DataPreset, this sets ``TargetField`` to ``PresetValue``.
}}

fields.PresetValue: The value for the preset. Float is used as an example. Since this is a generic component, it can be used with any value.
fields.TargetField: A reference to the field of the same type as PresetValue.
